metadata.name: Handle Order with Multiple Ship-To Locations

description: A retail chain places a single large order but needs parts of it shipped to different store locations.

nodes.task_description: Receive a purchase order with multiple ship-to addresses.

expected_outcome.value: Agent enters the order, noting the different destinations for different line items.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically splits the sales order into multiple shipments, one for each destination.

expected_outcome.value: The single order is broken into several sub-shipments in the WMS.

nodes.task_description: The warehouse fulfills each shipment separately.

expected_outcome.value: Each store location receives its correct portion of the order.
